description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that caches node_modules and build directories using a cache key derived from package.json and package-lock.json with prefix $CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG. Include the external template Taranta.gitlab-ci.yml from MaxIV/gitlab-ci-templates. Define stages lint, test, pre-build, build, deploy. In the lint stage add a js-lint job using the node:22-alpine image, installing make, git, bash via apk, running make js-install then make js-lint; it should run only when package.json exists and not on merge request events, and always upload the build directory as an artifact. In the test stage add a js-test job with the same image and before_script, executing make js-install then make js-test; it should run when package.json and any **/*.test.* files exist and not on merge request events, and always publish the build directory as an artifact named $CI_PROJECT_NAME-$CI_JOB_ID, along with Cobertura coverage report at build/reports/cobertura-coverage.xml and JUnit report at build/reports/junit.xml. In the pre-build stage add a tagging job that uses node:22-alpine, installs npm, git, bash via apk, runs npm version $(git describe --tags) --git-tag-version=false, has no dependencies, and always stores package.json as an artifact. Set variables DEPLOY_FRONTEND='true' and JS_NODE_VERSION=22.
